message:
fix: track per-command progress in migration steps for safe retry (gt-1e907)

Add CommandsCompleted field to StepRun checkpoint to track how many commands
within a multi-command step have succeeded. On retry, already-completed
commands are skipped instead of re-executed, preventing duplicate side effects.

Also fix asymmetric error handling: checkpoint save on the failure path now
surfaces errors via stderr warning instead of silently discarding them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
